name: Nebelhornbahn-Aktiengesellschaft
summary: Nebelhornbahn-Aktiengesellschaft operates mountain railway in Nebelhorn. It also provides catering services. The company was founded in 1927 and is based in Oberstdorf, Germany. The company was founded in 1927 and is based in Oberstdorf, Germany. Nebelhornbahn-Aktiengesellschaft was formerly a subsidiary of RWE Aktiengesellschaft.
